EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAGSServerConnectionFactory2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

Provides access to members that create and open GIS server connections and supply server connection factory information.

[Guid("0264CA94-B0EB-435F-9D3A-5FCC5DA0FBAE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAGSServerConnectionFactory2 : IAGSServerConnectionFactory

Properties

DefaultHttpTimeout

The default timeout for http requests to the server (in seconds).

int DefaultHttpTimeout { get; set; }

Property Value

int
